title: senna pumilio
intro: Senna pumilio, also known as the dwarf senna, is a perennial shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative and anti-inflammatory agent due to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna pumilio include its ability to relieve constipation, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried leaf tea, tinctures, and capsules, although it should be used under medical supervision and with caution due to its potential side effects.
